candidate_lesson.lesson_text: An ICT entry where bars_since_signal exceeds ~10 (signal is hours stale) is anti-edge even with commitment_score=1.0 and Grade A — the sweep liquidity has already been absorbed by the time price returns to the FVG.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: A bullish sweep + displacement is an institutional footprint with a short half-life: smart money fills its book in the minutes after the sweep. When bars_since_signal is large, the imbalance the FVG represents has been re-traded and the limit fill is into exhausted, not fresh, institutional flow — you are buying the retail echo of a move that already completed.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if signal_layers_active includes 'SWEEP' and bars_since_signal > 10: apply ICTVeto (or size x0.0); only execute sweep-driven entries when bars_since_signal <= 3
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Removes stale-sweep losers like the -1.004R AUDUSD trade; expected avgR lift on ICT sweep trades from negative toward the L6 fresh-pullback baseline, supporting +0.02-0.03 Sharpe via loss avoidance.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: Only 1 closed trade in window, a LOSS at -1.004R; it was Grade A, commitment 1.0, full 7-confirmation stack — quality gates all passed yet it still lost, pointing to a non-quality failure axis.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_reasoning: The single AUDUSD LOSS had bars_since_signal=1070 with commitment_score=1.0, grade A, and a confirmed BULLISH_SWEEP — maximal price-action quality but extreme staleness, the one reasoning field that was clearly degenerate.

retirement_flag.reason: L1 says London+GradeA+structure<1.5 is THE setup, but the only logged trade was Grade A in NY_Open (not London) and still lost — confirms L1's session restriction but suggests Grade A alone is being trusted to execute outside the London window; verify the executor is actually enforcing the London gate.

reflection.system_health_note: Regime=UNKNOWN with 0 trades in 7 days and only 1 closed trade total — the system is effectively idle/quarantined, so any Sharpe move must come from gate refinement (loss avoidance) rather than new entries until trade flow resumes.
